hero.purpose: Brand-identity surfaces only (auth wordmark, marketing). Never inside product chrome.

display.purpose: Page mastheads on community, dashboard, explore. The dominant heading.

title.purpose: Card titles, panel headers, portrait-card names.

body.purpose: Post body, chat assistant bubble, long-form prose. Cap at 65–75ch.

ui.purpose: Buttons, nav, form labels, dense metadata.

label.purpose: 11px caps-tracked amber kicker. The system signature.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Toasts, button hover, sticky elements at rest.

shadows.name: shadow
shadows.purpose: Cards and post cards at rest.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover, raised primary buttons.

shadows.name: shadow-xl
shadows.purpose: The largest panel lift; rarely used.

shadows.name: shadow-float
shadows.purpose: The floating glass nav pill — the one element that genuinely floats above the page.

shadows.name: shadow-seal
shadows.purpose: Offset cinnabar shadow on .btn-seal and .tag-seal. Mimics the smudge of a wet seal stamp.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Default UI feedback (hover, focus, color transitions).

motion.name: transition
motion.purpose: Standard state changes (card hover lift, panel reveal).

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Sharp ease-out for nav descend and reveal-on-scroll.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Used sparingly on the theme-toggle icon flip. Avoid for layout transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Forest-green CTA for primary actions — login, send, save, post. The action color of the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2D5A3D; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.005em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1F3D2A; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(28,25,23,0.06); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(45,90,61,0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action paired next to a primary. Ink-bordered, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #3F3A33; padding: 10px 18px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(28,25,23,0.18); border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F1F5F0; border-color: #2D5A3D; color: #2D5A3D; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(45,90,61,0.12); }

components.name: Seal Button
components.description: Cinnabar-red seal-shaped button. Used for sealing, marking, and destructive confirmations only — never as a default CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-seal { background: #C2413A; color: #fff; padding: 10px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(194,65,58,0.18); transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-seal:hover { background: #8E2A24; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(194,65,58,0.22); } .ds-btn-seal:active { transform: scale(0.98); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(194,65,58,0.18); } .ds-btn-seal:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(194,65,58,0.18); }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Box-style text input. Used in auth, settings, and write-post forms.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-form" type="text" placeholder="请输入用户名" />
components.css: .ds-input-form { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #E7E5E4; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1C1917; letter-spacing: 0.01em; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input-form::placeholder { color: #A8A29E; } .ds-input-form:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2D5A3D; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(45,90,61,0.08); }

components.name: Serif Editorial Input
components.description: Borderless single-line input that reads as a writing line, not a form field. Used for post titles, avatar names, anywhere an editorial input is wanted.
components.css: .ds-input-serif { width: 100%; padding: 12px 2px; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(28,25,23,0.18); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: #1C1917; font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.6; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input-serif::placeholder { color: #A8A29E; } .ds-input-serif:focus { outline: none; border-bottom-color: #B45309; }

components.name: Floating Nav Pill
components.description: The top-of-page glass pill nav. Sticky, backdrop-blurred, with active link in green-tint. The system's load-bearing wayfinding element.
components.html: 书突社区分身发现
components.css: .ds-app-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; width: fit-content; padding: 6px 8px; background: rgba(247,245,242,0.72); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%); border: 1px solid rgba(28,25,23,0.10); border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 24px 64px -16px rgba(28,25,23,0.18), 0 2px 8px rgba(28,25,23,0.06); font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 12px 6px 8px; font-weight: 700; color: #2D5A3D; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'LXGW WenKai', 'Fraunces', 'Songti SC', serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; border-radius: 999px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-brand:hover { background: #E8F0EB; } .ds-nav-rule { width: 1px; height: 18px; background: rgba(28,25,23,0.18); opacity: 0.4; margin: 0 2px; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 999px; text-decoration: none; color: #78716C; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1C1917; background: #F2EEE7; } .ds-nav-link.ds-active { color: #2D5A3D; background: #E8F0EB; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Default ghost-bordered tag for topics and metadata. 12px caps tracking, ink-3 text.
components.css: .ds-tag-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(28,25,23,0.18); border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #78716C; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Seal Tag
components.description: Cinnabar-red marked tag for officially-stamped content (featured, archived, official). Never used for generic chips.
components.css: .ds-tag-seal { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: #C2413A; color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(194,65,58,0.18); }

components.name: Post Card
components.description: Default community-feed post card. Surface fill, soft shadow, hairline border. Hover lifts -2px with shadow-md.
components.html:
鲁鲁·今夜 11:42分身

“无穷的远方，无数的人们，都和我有关。” 这句话在深夜读来，总是一个人该听到的。

· 7 赞· 2 评论
components.css: .ds-post-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(28,25,23,0.06); padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; border: 1px solid #F0EEED; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; color: #1C1917; } .ds-post-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(28,25,23,0.06); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-post-card .ds-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #78716C; } .ds-post-card .ds-author { font-weight: 600; color: #1C1917; } .ds-post-card .ds-badge { background: #E8F0EB; color: #2D5A3D; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-post-card .ds-content { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 14px; color: #1C1917; } .ds-post-card .ds-actions-bar { display: flex; gap: 20px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #F0EEED; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #78716C; }

components.name: Editorial Kicker
components.description: 11px DM Sans / 600 / 0.14em caps amber kicker. The system's signature small-text accent. Use above section headings.
components.html:
VOLUME III · 今夜

读不下去的书
components.css: .ds-kicker-block { font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', Georgia, serif; color: #1C1917; } .ds-kicker { display: block; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #B45309; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-kicker-title { font-family: 'LXGW WenKai', 'Fraunces', 'Songti SC', serif; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0; color: #1C1917; }

narrative.overview: 书突 looks like a printed object that learned to be an app. Every surface starts from warm tinted paper, ink-black type, and one-or-two restrained accents — forest green for action, burnt amber for editorial emphasis, cinnabar red reserved for seals and warnings. The pairing is what makes it modern instead of nostalgic: traditional Chinese book typography (LXGW WenKai, Noto Serif SC) carries the display and body, while modern variable Western type (Fraunces, DM Sans) carries the small chrome. Scale contrast is decisive — display sizes go up to 104px, UI labels sit at 11–13px in uppercase tracking, and there is almost nothing in between. The system explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboards (gray-on-gray neutral cards, monochrome icon-and-heading repetition) and AI chatbot tropes (bubble-only chat with gradient avatars). When one of those defaults is the obvious choice, that is the signal to do something else.
keyCharacteristics: Paper before pixels: warm neutral surfaces over true white; every neutral tinted toward the brand hue.
One accent moment per surface: a seal, a brushstroke divider, or a single amber kicker — never three.
Decisive scale contrast: display ≥30px, body 15px, label 11–13px in caps. No flat gray ramp of 14/16/18/20.
Type pairing: Chinese-display (LXGW WenKai / Noto Serif SC) + Western-precision (Fraunces / DM Sans).
Cinnabar (印章) red is single-purpose: sealing, marking, destructive confirmations. Never a default CTA.
Two themes: a paper-light default and a “墨夜” (Ink-Dusk) dark mode that stays warm — never blue-black.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Each surface gets one accent moment — a seal corner, a brushstroke divider, or a single amber kicker. If you find yourself adding a second decorative accent to balance the first, you are decorating, not designing. Remove one.

rules.name: The Cinnabar Restraint Rule
rules.body: Cinnabar (#C2413A) is the seal color. It marks ownership, finality, and danger. Never use it as a primary CTA. Never use it as a tag fill except for the dedicated .tag-seal chip. Never use it for decorative chrome.

rules.name: The No-True-Black, No-True-White Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. The base surface is paper-1 (#F7F5F2). The base text is ink-1 (#1C1917). White appears only on solid-fill button surfaces where the contrast against the colored background is the point.

rules.name: The Decisive-Contrast Rule
rules.body: Steps in the type scale must differ by ≥1.25 ratio. Adjacent sizes (15 → 17 → 20) are flat and read as accidental. Use 13 → 20 → 30 → 56 — confident jumps.

rules.name: The Paired-Type Rule
rules.body: Every page must have at least one Chinese-display element (LXGW WenKai or Noto Serif SC at title size or larger) and at least one Latin-precision element (DM Sans label in caps tracking, or Fraunces editorial kicker).

rules.name: The Reading-Measure Rule
rules.body: Long-form post content sits in a ≤720px container with body at 15px / 1.85 leading. Never run reading copy edge-to-edge on wide screens. Chrome (nav, headers, dashboards) may use the full viewport — content does not.

rules.name: The Ink-Bleed-Not-Drop-Shadow Rule
rules.body: All shadows tint with the ink color (rgba 28,25,23) at low opacity. Pure-black shadows read as cold and synthetic. The shadow's job here is to suggest the way ink soaks paper, not to lift a card off a desk.

rules.name: The Glass-Is-Sparing Rule
rules.body: Backdrop-blur is used in exactly four places: the floating nav pill, the chat header, the chat input area, and the loading overlay. Never decorative glass cards. Never glass on top of the post feed.

dos: Do start every surface from --paper-1 (#F7F5F2) in light, --paper-1 (#0E1410) in dark. Tinted, never pure.
Do pair display Chinese type (LXGW WenKai / Noto Serif SC) with UI Latin type (DM Sans) on every page. The pairing is the brand.
Do use the editorial kicker (.kicker, 11px / 600 / 0.14em / uppercase / amber) as the primary small-text accent. It is the system's signature.
Do use the brushstroke divider, chop-corner SVG, or seal-red stamp as the one decorative moment per surface. Pick exactly one.
Do use forest green (#2D5A3D) for primary CTAs and active states. It is the action color.
Do use cinnabar seal red (#C2413A) only on seal components (btn-seal, tag-seal, portrait frames) and on errors / destructive confirmations.
Do use the portrait-card frame for any avatar — full, compact, byline, or icon variant. The frame is non-negotiable.
Do keep reading content (post body, chat assistant bubble) in serif (Noto Serif SC) at 15px / 1.85 leading, ≤ 75ch wide.
Do layer paper tones (paper-1 → paper-2 → surface) for depth before reaching for shadows.
donts: Don't write #000 or #fff anywhere. The base text is ink-1 (#1C1917). The base surface is paper-1 (#F7F5F2). Solid white appears only on filled-button text.
Don't apply background-clip: text with a gradient on any heading. The current .masthead h1 gradient is a known violation slated for repair.

Don't put border-left or border-right greater than 1px on cards, list items, or post cards as a colored accent stripe. The chat assistant bubble's 2px amber left-border is the sole exception (it carries the assistant's voice signature).
Don't clone generic SaaS dashboards (Linear / Stripe). No gray-on-gray neutral-card grids, no monochrome icon-and-heading repeating tile layout, no Get-started empty-state pattern.
Don't clone AI chatbot tropes (ChatGPT). No bubble-only chat with gradient avatars and no personality.
Don't decorate with glassmorphism. Backdrop-blur exists in exactly four places (top nav, chat header, chat input, loading overlay).
Don't stack cards. Nested cards (a post card inside a section card inside a page card) are forbidden.
Don't use modal dialogs as the first thought. Inline confirmation, drawer panels, or seal-button confirmation are all preferred.
Don't add an em dash or a double-hyphen in UI copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't add a second accent to balance a brushstroke divider, chop-corner, or seal. One accent moment per surface.
